scripts.start: npm-run-all --parallel start:base start:crm && echo All start scripts ran successfully!
scripts.test: npm-run-all --parallel test:base test:crm && echo All test scripts ran successfully!
scripts.lint: npm-run-all --parallel lint:base lint:crm && echo All lint scripts ran successfully!
scripts.dev: npm-run-all --parallel dev:base dev:crm && echo All dev scripts ran successfully!
scripts.debug: npm-run-all --parallel debug:base debug:crm && echo All debug scripts ran successfully!
scripts.build: npm run build:base && npm run build:crm
